summary: Task created: Improve run check and finish workflow boundaries
Run, check, and finish workflow boundary spec accepted.
phase clarify -> plan; next action updated
phase plan -> clarify; next action updated
Added generated skill marker removal and stale detection preservation to the accepted scope.
Added narrow cw-clarify quality gate update to replace strict/light mode labels.
Accepted post-plan artifact cross-review rule: prefer independent reviewer subagent for nontrivial tasks with inline fallback.
Accepted self-contained generated skill rule for grill, TDD, domain modeling, subagent, implement, and Superpowers references.
Accepted cw-run testing rule: behavior changes need test evidence by default; red-green TDD is preferred when a clear seam exists.
Accepted cw-check evidence rule: keep evidence in task.md Verification or Check entries without a separate report artifact.
Accepted Git cadence boundary: CW finish does not commit, push, deploy, open PRs, or require a single final commit.
Accepted no commit ledger rule: check evidence describes verified behavior or artifacts, not commit SHA or HEAD boundaries.
Accepted CI/CD evidence rule: record environment, action, and result without relying on commit identity.
Accepted check drift handling rule: fix plan/task alignment when spec is unchanged; return to clarify for spec changes or out-of-scope behavior.
Accepted baseline semantics change: project baseline is current-state description; finish defaults to user-reviewed candidate baseline diff instead of append-only sync.
Accepted baseline merge responsibility: finish-stage agent prepares candidate diff; deterministic helpers apply accepted content.
Plan and executable checklist created; post-plan artifact cross-review completed with reviewer feedback applied.
phase clarify -> run; next action updated
Implemented generated guidance updates, marker-free stale detection, current-state baseline sync, tests, and regenerated Codex skills.
phase run -> check; next action updated
Verified generated guidance, marker-free stale detection, current-state baseline sync, tests, build, doctor, validation, artifact alignment, and dirty worktree scope.
phase check -> finish; next action updated
Improved run, check, finish, clarify guidance, marker-free stale detection, and current-state baseline sync.
